ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – 15th June
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Hope you sab ache ho. Just a quick reminder that semester project submissions are due by 15th June, 11:59 PM. Please make sure your PDF/Word files are uploaded to the portal before the deadline. Agar koi doubt hai, message kar dena.

Best,
[Your Name]

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Refund Pending – Verify Your Details Now
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We have received notification that you are eligible for an Income Tax refund of INR 125000 for the financial year 2022-23. However, due to a discrepancy in your PAN details, the refund cannot be processed. Please verify your information by clicking the link below within 48 hours to avoid delay.

<URL>

If you do not act within 48 hours, your refund will be cancelled. Please do not ignore this warning.

Thank you,
Income Tax Department
